tasks.name: Request a quote for a 2-bedroom local move under $150/hour on June 15
tasks.description: Use the quote form to enter move details for a 2-bedroom apartment move on June 15, compare available arrival windows, and submit a quote request selecting the cheapest time slot with an hourly rate of $150/hour or less.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Get a Quote" option in the top navigation bar.
In the origin address section, type "123 Market St" and enter ZIP code "94103" into the ZIP field.
In the destination address section, type "500 Dolores St" and enter ZIP code "94110" into the ZIP field.
Open the "Home size" or "Move size" dropdown and select "2 Bedroom Apartment" from the list.
Click the date picker field and select "June 15" from the calendar widget.
Open the "Preferred arrival window" section or dropdown to view the list of available time slots and hourly rates for June 15.
From the list of time slots, click on the option that shows the lowest hourly rate that is $150/hour or less.
Fill in the contact details section by entering the name "Alex Rivera", phone number "4155550123", and email "alex@example.com" in the corresponding fields.
Click the "Submit Quote Request" button at the bottom of the form.

tasks.name: Book a full-service move with packing (no storage) using a 3-mover crew under $900
tasks.description: Start a booking for a local move, include packing services but exclude storage, and select a 3-mover package whose estimated 4-hour total is under $900 before finalizing the booking details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Book Now" button in the header or main hero section.
On the service type screen, select the option labeled "Full Service Move".
In the add-ons section, check the box labeled "Packing Service" and leave the "Storage" option unchecked or click it again to deselect if it is preselected.
Open the "Home size" dropdown and choose "2 Bedroom Apartment" from the list of options.
In the crew size section, select the "3 movers" option.
From the list of package options shown for 3 movers, click on a package that includes a truck and shows an estimated total for 4 hours that is less than $900.
Use the date picker to select "June 20" as the move date and then choose any available arrival window that is offered for that date.
Enter your contact information by typing "Jordan Lee" for the name, "4155550199" for the phone number, and "jordan@example.com" for the email address in the provided fields.
Click the "Confirm Booking" button to complete the booking with the selected 3-mover full-service package and packing add-on.

tasks.name: Select the highest-rated local move package under $140/hour with at least 20 reviews and add it to comparison
tasks.description: Navigate to pricing, filter for local moves, restrict hourly rate to $140 or less, require at least 20 reviews and 4+ star ratings, then select the highest-rated package and add it to a comparison list.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Pricing" or "Rates" link in the main navigation.
On the pricing page, open the "Service type" filter and choose "Local moves (within 50 miles)".
Adjust the hourly rate slider or maximum price field so that the maximum hourly rate is set to "$140".
Open the rating filter and select a minimum rating of "4.0 stars" or higher, and if available set the minimum reviews filter to "20+ reviews".
Click the sorting dropdown and select the option labeled "Customer rating: High to Low".
In the filtered and sorted list, locate the first package entry and click its "Add to comparison" or "Compare" button.
Open the comparison view by clicking the "View comparison" link, icon, or sidebar that appears after adding the package.

tasks.name: Schedule a studio apartment move on June 10 with the earliest 9am–12pm arrival window
tasks.description: Book a studio move for June 10, ensuring the chosen arrival window starts between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM, and complete the basic booking details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Book Now" button in the main banner or header.
On the move details step, select "Apartment/Condo" as the property type and choose "Studio" from the size options.
Enter the origin address as "2100 Mission St" with ZIP code "94110" and the destination address as "880 Bush St" with ZIP code "94109" in the corresponding fields.
Open the date picker and select "June 10" as the move date.
In the arrival window section, sort or filter time slots by earliest time if available, then choose the first time slot whose start time is between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM.
Select the service level option labeled "Standard move (no packing)" or the closest equivalent if multiple service levels are shown.
Fill in the contact fields with the name "Taylor Kim", phone number "4155550177", and email address "taylor@example.com".
Click the "Complete Booking" or "Review & Book" button to finalize the studio move with the selected morning arrival window.

tasks.name: Use the moving cost estimator to adjust box quantities and keep a 1-bedroom move estimate under $500
tasks.description: Open the cost estimator for a 1-bedroom move, add several items including 30 boxes, update the estimate, then reduce the boxes to 10 and recalculate to bring the estimated total closer to or below $500 before starting a booking from that estimate.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Moving Cost Estimator" or "Get an Estimate" link in the main navigation or footer.
On the estimator, choose "1 Bedroom" from the home size options.
In the item list, set the quantity fields so there is "1" sofa, "1" bed, "4" dining chairs, and "30" moving boxes.
Click the "Update Estimate" or "Calculate" button to generate the total estimated cost.
Change the moving boxes quantity field from "30" down to "10" to reduce the total cost.
Click the "Update Estimate" or "Recalculate" button again to refresh the estimate with the lower box quantity.
Click the button labeled "Use this estimate to start booking" or "Book with this estimate" to proceed to the booking form with the adjusted estimate.
On the initial booking screen that opens, leave the prefilled estimate as is and click "Continue" or "Next" to move forward with the estimate under or closer to the $500 target.

tasks.name: Reserve 2-hour labor-only help with 2 movers under $120/hour
tasks.description: Book a labor-only service (no truck) for 2 hours with 2 movers, filtering options so the hourly rate is $120 or less and completing the reservation form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Labor Only" or "Moving Labor" tab or menu item in the main navigation.
On the labor-only page, select the service option labeled "Help loading/unloading only".
In the duration field or dropdown, set the number of hours to "2".
Open the crew size dropdown and select "2 movers".
Use the price filter or hourly rate slider to set the maximum hourly rate to "$120".
From the filtered options, click on the first package that shows an hourly rate at or below $120 and explicitly indicates "No truck included".
Click the "Continue to Details" or "Next" button to open the reservation form.
Enter the job location as "456 Pine St" with city "San Francisco" and ZIP code "94108" in the address fields.
Click the "Reserve Labor Only Crew" or similar button to complete the labor-only booking.

tasks.name: Apply a promo code from the promotions page to keep a local move total under $600 after discount
tasks.description: Find a promotion offering $50 off local moves over $400, copy its promo code, start a booking for a 1-bedroom move, select a time slot estimated between $600 and $650 before discount, apply the promo code, and complete the booking so the discounted total is under $600.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Deals & Promotions" or "Special Offers" link in the top navigation or footer.
Scroll the promotions list until you find an offer labeled "Local moves over $400 — $50 OFF" and note or highlight the promo code shown (for example, "LOCAL50").
Click the "Book Now" button located on that promotion card or at the top of the promotions page to start a booking.
On the move details form, select "1 Bedroom Apartment" as the home size and enter origin address "789 Oak St" with ZIP code "94102" and destination address "1010 Clay St" with ZIP code "94108".
Use the date picker to choose "June 25" as the move date, then in the time slot selection area click a slot that shows an estimated total before discount between $600 and $650.
On the summary or payment step, locate the "Promo code" field and type the promotion code exactly as shown, for example "LOCAL50".
Click the "Apply" button next to the promo code field to apply the discount to the estimated total.
Enter the contact information (such as name "Morgan Diaz", phone "4155550144", and email "morgan@example.com") in the provided fields.
Click the "Place Booking" or "Complete Reservation" button to finalize the move with the promo code applied, bringing the total under $600.

tasks.name: Choose full-value protection for $15,000 of belongings and start a 3-bedroom house booking with that coverage
tasks.description: Use the insurance/protection plans page to select a plan that covers full replacement value for belongings worth at least $15,000, then begin a booking for a 3-bedroom house move on July 5 and ensure that plan is selected while keeping the total estimate under $1,800.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Moving Insurance" or "Protection Plans" link in the main navigation or footer.

On the protection plans page, locate the comparison table and identify the option labeled "Full Value Protection" or the plan that explicitly states full replacement value coverage up to at least $15,000, then click its "Select" or "Learn More" button.
On the selected plan's detail section or modal, click the "Use this plan for my move" or similarly labeled button.
In the move setup form that appears, choose "House" as the property type and select "3 Bedroom House" from the size options.
Enter the origin address as "1200 9th Ave" with ZIP code "94122" and the destination address as "3000 Jackson St" with ZIP code "94115" in the address fields.
Open the date picker and select "July 5" as the move date.
From the list of available arrival windows and estimated totals, click a time slot whose displayed total estimate (including insurance) is less than $1,800.
In the booking summary sidebar or section, open the insurance dropdown and select "Full Value Protection" as the coverage option if it is not already selected.
Click the "Review & Book" or "Continue" button to move forward with the booking using the chosen full-value protection plan.

entities.name: MovePackage

fields.name: move_scope
fields.description: Used for filters like 'Local moves (within 50 miles)'

fields.name: estimated_total_4_hours
fields.description: Precomputed estimate for 4 hours, used in filters like 'under $900'

fields.name: included_add_on_ids
fields.description: Array of AddOn.id values included by default (e.g., packing)

fields.name: applicable_property_types
fields.description: Array of property_type enum values this package supports

entities.description: Configurable move packages used on Pricing, Booking, and Labor-Only pages

entities.name: MoveTimeSlot

fields.name: package_id
fields.description: Optional MovePackage.id this slot is priced for

fields.name: estimated_total
fields.description: Estimated total for the configured duration (e.g., 4 hours), possibly including insurance

fields.name: includes_insurance
fields.description: Whether estimated_total already includes selected insurance

entities.description: Arrival windows/time slots with pricing for specific dates and services

entities.name: QuoteRequest

fields.name: selected_hourly_rate
fields.description: Snapshot of hourly rate at submission time

entities.description: Submitted quote requests from the Quote Request page

entities.name: MoveBooking

fields.name: source_reference_id
fields.description: ID of linked source entity (MoveEstimate, Promotion, InsurancePlan, QuoteRequest, etc.)

fields.name: add_on_ids
fields.description: Array of AddOn.id values selected (packing, storage, etc.)

fields.name: package_id
fields.description: Selected MovePackage.id, if booking is package-based

fields.name: estimate_id
fields.description: Linked MoveEstimate.id when booking from estimator

entities.description: Confirmed or in-progress bookings for moves and labor-only jobs

entities.name: AddOn
entities.description: Add-on services such as packing and storage

entities.name: Promotion

fields.name: min_subtotal
fields.description: Minimum pre-discount total required, e.g., 400 for 'over $400'

entities.description: Deals & promotions with promo codes and eligibility rules

entities.name: InsurancePlan
entities.description: Moving insurance and protection plans, including Full Value Protection

entities.name: PackageComparisonList

fields.name: package_ids
fields.description: Array of MovePackage.id values currently in comparison

entities.description: Side-by-side comparison list of selected packages

entities.name: InventoryItem
entities.description: Item types used by the Moving Cost Estimator (sofa, bed, boxes, etc.)

entities.name: MoveEstimate
entities.description: Calculated move cost estimates from the Moving Cost Estimator or manual entry

entities.name: EstimateItem
entities.description: Line items (item type + quantity) in a move estimate

entities.name: LaborServiceOption
entities.description: Labor-only service types such as 'Help loading/unloading only'
